summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ops AI restaurant operations PWA. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend login, dashboard, and basic navigation working. Some UI interaction issues identified with overlay elements.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepting clicks on navigation elements
Chart width/height warnings in console for dashboard charts

integration_issues.issue: Navigation to AI insights page blocked by overlay element

passed_tests: Backend API health check (28/28 endpoints passing)
Dashboard KPI display and period selection
Bar inventory location selection and navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix overlay issue with Emergent badge that's blocking navigation clicks. The badge element is intercepting pointer events and preventing users from clicking navigation buttons. Consider adjusting z-index or pointer-events CSS property.
